Functions and APIs for app file management, flash translation, and Pebble File System operations.


## Files
- **[app_file.c](app_file.c.md)**: Functions for creating, validating, and parsing app file names and IDs in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_file.h](app_file.h.md)**: Functions for managing and parsing app-specific file names with consistent naming schemes.
- **[flash_translation.c](flash_translation.c.md)**: Implements flash translation layer operations for reading, writing, and erasing flash memory regions.
- **[flash_translation.h](flash_translation.h.md)**: Flash Translation Layer for managing and expanding filesystem across multiple flash regions.
- **[pfs.c](pfs.c.md)**: Implements a flash-based filesystem with functions for file operations, garbage collection, and system initialization.
- **[pfs.h](pfs.h.md)**: APIs for the Pebble File System (PFS) with features like wear-leveling, file operations, and event watching.
